features: ♥ Unique Triple Photo Frame Set: Three interconnected heart-shaped frames create a charming display for your cherished memories. You can display three 4x6 inch photos, allowing you to showcase a variety of precious moments in a space-saving design.

♥ Durable Quality Material: The photo frame 6x4 crafted from quality wood and clear glass for clarity and image protection. These picture frames 6x4 are sturdy and lightweight. Our multi photo frame has three 4x6" heart frames, that measures in total of 28.3x8".

♥ Chic Twine Hanging: The white textured frames are connected by stylish twine, hanging neatly on your wall for a fashionable decor solution without clutter. Our multi photo frames for wall require no tools or assembly, offering you the utmost convenience. Simply insert your favorite 6x4 photos or postcards for an immediate display.

♥ Rustic White Picture Frames: With white woodgrain and shabby chic decoration, these 6x4 photo frames suit Nordic, farmhouse or boho styles. Three-in-one display perfect for showcasing family photos, wedding moments, or romantic memories in a visually cohesive way.

♥ Thoughtful Gift Photo Frame: The heart shape and soft tones make this ideal for Valentine's Day, Mother's Day or birthdays. A meaningful gift that combines sentiment and style, that will surely be cherished by all recipients.
FSC Certified: The frame of the photo frame is made of FSC-certified wood.
